steps.t: Go to the marketplace outside Tûl Zakana, the Well of Forgetting, and barter for some of their water with the coin Usakâr gave you. Tûl Zakana is far …
Talk to the Shagâni man behind the counter, and barter for some of their water.
Fight off the attackers and flee up the hill!
Return to Usakâr at Dag Usakâra and tell him what happened.
